description: Student Attendance entry: Mark Attendance for? segmented Class | Subject (Class selected), class select (e.g. XII - C), Select Date with Today label and date chip, Which Session? (Both, Morning, Evening), Mark all as (Present, Absent, Punches), sticky Continue.
notes: Figma shows date chip copy as 19 Aug, 2025; example_response uses ISO date for selectedDate. Session row: Both uses distinct selected styling in file — confirm product default. Subject tab visible but inactive when markAttendanceFor is class.
